_schema: T18.5 ACI Strip Length Table v1
_comment: Maps ACI identifiers to required wire strip lengths in millimetres. Derive values from Komax applicator setup sheets or terminal manufacturer specifications. Partial population is safe — unmatched ACIs remain operator-required. All stripLengthMm values are numeric (float). An optional strippingNote provides human context.

entries.strippingNote: TE 14-16 AWG crimp — standard insulation strip
